pages.text: $(italic)Tinkers' Construct$() — not a chapter but the index. Every material, modifier and mechanic the mod owns, gathered into one volume; the book to keep once the other five are read.$(br2)$(bold)To obtain:$() $(italic)cast$() it — a $(italic)Book$() on a Casting Table, molten gold poured over.
pages.title: Encyclopedia of Tinkering
